ground_truth.title: Top 5 Graphic Design Courses in 2025
ground_truth.author: Ahmad Hasan
ground_truth.main_content:
In 2025, graphic design is more dynamic than ever. Here are the top 5 courses you should consider:

1. Coursera - Graphic Design Specialization (CalArts) - Learn core principles of graphic design, typography, and image-making from one of the top art schools.

2. Udemy - The Complete Graphic Design Theory for Beginners Course - This course offers beginner-to-pro lessons in layout, color, and branding.

3. LinkedIn Learning - Become a Graphic Designer Path - Offers a structured learning roadmap from basic skills to software mastery.

4. Domestika - Graphic Design for Beginners - Ideal for visual learners, this platform features high-quality video production and real-world projects.

5. Skillshare - Great Graphic Design: Create Emotional, Gripping Typographic Art - Focuses on typography and creativity, taught by professionals in the field.

These courses cover essential tools like Photoshop, Illustrator, and Figma, giving you a strong portfolio in 2025.
